Class Pickaxe

java.lang.Object
logic.pickaxe.Pickaxe
public class Pickaxe extends Object
Represents a pickaxe used to mine ore nodes on the game world map. Higher mining power breaks nodes faster and allows harder ores to be mined.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Pickaxe(String name, int power)
    Creates a new pickaxe with the given name and mining power.

  • Constructor Details

    • Pickaxe

      public Pickaxe(String name, int power)
      Creates a new pickaxe with the given name and mining power.
      Parameters:
      name - the display name of the pickaxe
      power - the mining power; clamped to a minimum of 1

  • Method Details

    • createWoodenPickaxe

      public static Pickaxe createWoodenPickaxe()
      Creates a Wooden Pickaxe with mining power 2.
      Returns:
      a new wooden pickaxe

    • createNormalStonePickaxe

      public static Pickaxe createNormalStonePickaxe()
      Creates a Normal Stone Pickaxe with mining power 3.
      Returns:
      a new normal stone pickaxe

    • createHardStonePickaxe

      public static Pickaxe createHardStonePickaxe()
      Creates a Hard Stone Pickaxe with mining power 5.
      Returns:
      a new hard stone pickaxe

    • createIronPickaxe

      public static Pickaxe createIronPickaxe()
      Creates an Iron Pickaxe with mining power 12.
      Returns:
      a new iron pickaxe

    • createPlatinumPickaxe

      public static Pickaxe createPlatinumPickaxe()
      Creates a Platinum Pickaxe with mining power 27.
      Returns:
      a new platinum pickaxe

    • createMithrilPickaxe

      public static Pickaxe createMithrilPickaxe()
      Creates a Mithril Pickaxe with mining power 45.
      Returns:
      a new mithril pickaxe

    • createVibraniumPickaxe

      public static Pickaxe createVibraniumPickaxe()
      Creates a Vibranium Pickaxe with mining power 100.
      Returns:
      a new vibranium pickaxe

    • use

      public List<BaseItem> use(Mineable target, Player player)
      Uses this pickaxe on the given mineable target, applying the mining power.
      Parameters:
      target - the ore node to mine
      player - the player performing the mining action
      Returns:
      the list of items dropped if the node broke, or an empty list otherwise

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the display name of this pickaxe.
      Returns:
      pickaxe name

    • getPower

      public int getPower()
      Returns the mining power of this pickaxe.
      Returns:
      mining power

    • setPower

      public void setPower(int power)
      Sets the mining power of this pickaxe.
      Parameters:
      power - the new mining power
